actionCadenceStepTrackerId.title: actionCadenceStepTrackerId
actionCadenceStepTrackerId.description: Stores the ID of the action cadence step tracker that is passed into the flow.

targetId.title: targetId
targetId.description: Stores the ID of the target passed into the flow. It can be a Lead ID, Contact ID, or the Person Contact ID for a Person Account.
